4-ho-mpmi.dose_note: Note: As of writing this note, this substance has not been reported on dosages past 2mg. Caution should be given when dosing. The drug is near eqipotent to DOI.
4-ho-mpmi.name: 4-ho-mpmi

properties.dose: Oral Threshold: 500-750ug. Light: 750ug-1mg Common: 1-2mg. | Note, this substance has never been reported on past 2mg's. Use you're judgement; It's near eqipotent to DOI.
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: A rare tryptamine derivative first synthesised by David Nichols. This drug, also known as lucigenol, has rarely been documented outside the lab. It is known to be a psychedelic similar to other psychoactive tryptamines, with a potency similar to DOI. Little else is known about the drug.
